calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-04-2004 Continued To Aug-09-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-09-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Linday Reyes, Esq. for Plaintiff: Third and Mission Associates, LLC.
No appearance by the Defendant: Joseph Henry Watkins.
9:35 a.m. Plaintiff's witness: Joseph Milledge, was sworn and direct examined by counsel.
Exhibit 1- Lease agreement dtd. 01-11-04------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2- Three day notice dtd. 6-9-04-------------------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for restitution and possession of the premises at:
680 Mission St., #27-A, San Francisco.
Per Diem Damages $494.34
Costs $268.30
Rental agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits.
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-09-2004 Assigned To Trial Court

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE this day.
NO SITTING JUDGE, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha.
Shawn Bankson, Esq., for Plaintiff: Third and Mission Associates LLC. dba The Paramount.
No appearance by the Defendant: Joseph Henry Watkins.
Defendant's jury demand is stricken and case to proceed as Court Trial.
Trial date confirmed.
